title: Chelyabinsk, Chelyabinsk Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Chelyabinsk, Chelyabinsk Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Chelyabinsk is a city in Chelyabinsk Oblast with a population of 1,200,000. An industrial powerhouse in the Urals, known for its metallurgy industry, and a gateway to the scenic Ural Mountains.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
